---
title: "Academics"
---

<br>

```{r out.width = "50%", fig.align = "center", echo = FALSE}
#knitr::include_graphics("Convocation.jpg")
```

<br>

Here is an overview of my academic career and teaching activities. For more details on these, please take a look at my [CV](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1EaBT63r_Bf7c6FvuQL7TphOHW0GLYQit/view?usp=sharing).

## Education

- **PhD Biostatistics**, University of Michigan, 2016 - Present.


## Teaching
